assumptions: The intragroup dividend has been declared and recognised as a receivable/payable, so the exposure is analysed as a recognised intragroup monetary item rather than as a forecast transaction.
The receivable/payable is between group entities with different functional currencies and the related foreign exchange differences are not fully eliminated on consolidation.

approaches.label: Hedge of foreign currency risk on an intragroup monetary item
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 provides a genuine hedge-designation route in consolidated financial statements for the foreign currency risk of an intragroup monetary item when the resulting exchange differences are not fully eliminated on consolidation.
